roa.docketEntryComment: Bench Warrant Issued
Warrant Discharged

/CAL:PAROLE'S PETITION TO REVOKE OR MODIFY PAROLE PURSUANT TO PC3000,08/X:AGT RAMY YASSINE SPECIALLY APPEARING FOR STATE PAROLE/PDP/WIAPTR/3000ADV/3000ADM/X:THE PAROLEE'S ADMISSION IS AS TO VIOLATION #1,2 AND 4,/3000REIN/PAJ:154 DAYS/X:WITHOUT TIME LOSS/X:PAROLEE SHALL RECEIVE CREDIT FOR 67 DAYS,/4019HALF/X:DISTRICT ATTORNEY MOTION TO DISMISS REMAINING ALLEGATIONSIS GRANTED,/X:PAROLE REINSTATED TO: 2-15-19 /X:PAROLEE ORDERED TO REPORT TO PAROLE UPONRELEASE AND FOLLOW INSTRUCTIONS GIVEN BY THE PAROLE AGENT,/

/CAL: PAROLE PROGRESS REPORT/X: PAROLE AGENT RAMY YASSINE APPEARING/OR/CTORD: RELEASED TO PAROLE COURT REPRESENTATIVE CHARLES BROWN/X: HOUSING PENDING BED AVAILABILITY AT CITYWIDE PROGRAM/ /X: RELEASE ORDERED SIGNED/CONT
/X: CAL: PAROLE PROGRESS REPORT/DAWT/X: PAROLE AGENT RAMY YASSINE APPEARING/4011,5/NB/X: REMANDED FOR CUSTODY CREDITS/SHER2: 11-11-18/X: CONTINUED FOR PAROLE PROGRESS REPORT AND STATUS/DOPC/

/CAL: TO SET PROBABLE CAUSE HEARING, PAROLE MODIFIED/OR/X: PAROLE AGENT RAMY YASSINE APPEARING/CTORD: RELEASED TO PAROLE COURT REPRESENTATIVE CHARLES BROWN/X: HOUSING PENDING BED AVAILABILITY/ /X: RELEASE ORDERED SIGNED//X: PAROLE PROGRESS REPORT NEXT DATE/DOP/

/CAL: PAROLE'S PETITION TO REVOKE PAROLE PURSUANT TO PC3000,08/X: PAROLE AGENT RAMY YASSINE APPEARING/PDP/WIAPTR/X: PAROLEE ENTERS A NOT TRUE AS TOTHE ALLEGATIONS/NB/X: PAROLE IS ADMINISTRATIVELY REVOKED/X: TIME IS NOTWAIVED FOR PROBABLE CAUSE HEARING/CONTD: PROBABLE CAUSE HEARING/

/CAL: PAROLE'S PETITION TO REVOKE PAROLE PURSUANT TO PC3000,08/X: PAROLE AGENT RAMY YASSINE APPEARING/NP/X: DEFENDANT AT SF GENERAL HOSPITAL TODAY//X: DEFENSE MAKES AN ORAL MOTION TO HAVE ARRAIGNMENT HEARD AT SFGH/MO DENIED/X: THE COURT FINDS GOOD CAUSE FOR CONTINUANCE/ /CONT/
